chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4752 of 2020 Tipu Sultan Versus Chief Secretary, Government of Sindh & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 3182/21 2. For orders on CMA 3183/21. 3. For orders as to non-prosecution. Dated: 01.02.2021 Petitioner present in person. -.-.- 1) Granted. 2) This application for withdrawal of the petition is supported by affidavit of the petitioner who himself is present in person and submits that he does not wish to proceed with the matter. The application is accordingly allowed and petition is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge
